name: ten30studio
description: Plugins built by Ten30 Studio for AI-native production houses, productized agencies, and chat-first SMB operators. Each plugin packages a real operational pattern from the Kitt agent stack.

plugins.name: the-bookkeeper
plugins.description: Track the market-rate value of every service you deliver — even (especially) the work you give away. Itemized statements with sourced market-rate pricing, courtesy discounts visible, client-by-client engagement history. Built for productized agencies, solo consultants, freelancers, and AI-native operators.
